overview: Dr. Arman Kabir's Care is a comprehensive bilingual (English/Bangla) Patient Management and Doctor Portal for clinics and hospitals. It supports OPD and inpatient workflows with role-based dashboards for Consultant, MO, Nurse, Reception, and Admin. Features include patient registration, visit management, prescriptions with clinical intelligence, medication tracking, inpatient daily progress (SOAP), discharge summaries, emergency prescriptions, bed management, payment processing, and real-time sync across devices.
features: Role-based dashboards with clinical action centers
Medication Administration Record (MAR) with per-dose tracking
Discharge Summary Generator with auto-compiled clinical data
Clinical Alerts Engine (Sepsis, AKI, NEWS2, Hypoglycemia, Hypertensive urgency)
Referral Letter Generator with printable PDF
Digital Consent Forms with signature capture
Patient Timeline View — all events chronologically
Audit Dashboard for Admin with visual charts
Printable Patient Summary Card with QR code
Ward Round efficiency tools (Quick Review, Bedside Checklist, Round Summary)
